'''''Drakmha''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] serving as a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], in service during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Equipped with a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]], [[Engine/Legends|engines]], and a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], it was armed with a [[Proton torpedo launcher/Legends|proton torpedo launcher]], [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]], and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], as well as [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. The ''Drakhma'' carried several [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] in its [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]].<ref name="EAW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Drakhma'' first appeared in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'', in which the name can be randomly applied to an ''Acclamator''-class [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ship]].<ref name="EAW" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
